highlights.text: I wrote yesterday: “For tomorrow, the bull case is that the 5720-23 multi-month megaphone pattern defends.” What did we do today?
This was an epic battle for price at this core multi-month month support with ES putting in multiple examples of my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
The technicals though, as always, gave us clear structure to work with and much of yesterdays and todays action centered around a key level: 5720-23.

post_title: Biggest Red Week For SPX Since The Last Bear Market. Now What? March 10 Plan
